summary: new-solt: shell execution in index.js requires manual review
details: Package index.js imports child_process and invokes execSync with bash and zsh shells (around lines 315 and 331). The shell-execution surface is concrete, but the contextual purpose, trigger, and command contents are not corroborated by traced behavior. Without confirmation that these shells run at install/import time or carry attacker-controlled content, the pattern alone is insufficient to publish a malicious verdict, but it is unusual enough in a package of this scope to warrant a human look.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
